narrative:
Wakeman Township has 1,677 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points.
